title: POW/MIA flag; display over state capitol
doc_html:
§153.1.  POW/MIA flag; display over state capitol

The POW/MIA flag shall be displayed beneath the Louisiana state flag, and shall wave from sunrise to sunset each day over the state capitol.

Acts 1995, No. 1256, §1.
